ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "current_gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "academic_advisor" TEXT /* Name of the academic advisor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, suspended, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible for the test */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the test belongs */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., midterm, final, quiz) */,
  "test_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the test (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken by the student */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was taken */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the test performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score calculated from all test scores */,
  "rounded_average" INTEGER /* Rounded average score to the nearest whole number */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Indicates if the student qualifies for honors (YES/NO) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade based on the rounded average score */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Spring 2023, Fall 2023) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned in the course */,
  "is_retake" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is a retake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES tests ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., faculty, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES academic_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
